item.title: Waiting for Walmart to Pull Back? Now’s the Time to Buy
item.description: Walmart is on track to hit record highs, but first, the market needs to catch up with reality, digest the guidance, and prepare for its next run.

item.title: The Hidden Value in Genuine Parts Company’s Spin-Off Plan
item.description: Genuine Parts Company’s recent selloff offers value investors a chance to buy an industrial distributor before it spins off as a standalone firm.

item.title: NVIDIA and Meta Deepen Their AI Alliance—and the Spending Numbers Are Enormous
item.description: Meta Platforms and NVIDIA are expanding their alliance to deploy millions of future chips that power personal superintelligence for billions of users.

item.title: REITs Set for a 2026 Rebound? 7 Top Picks as Rate Cuts Approach
item.description: Get seven REIT picks positioned for a 2026 rebound as rate cuts near: five core SWAN names for stability plus two higher-yield turnaround plays with s...

item.title: Rocket Lab Earnings Loom as Neutron Timeline Takes Center Stage
item.description: Rocket Lab (NASDAQ: RKLB) shares have pulled back nearly 30% from their highs ahead of a pivotal fourth-quarter earnings report.
